IdleMotionComponent.Description: The component that controls how the NPC moves during idle state

AlertedRange.Description: A range within which the player can be seen/sensed when the NPC is alerted to their presence

AttackSequence.Description: The attack sequence to use in combat

AttackDistance.Description: The distance at which an NPC will execute attacks

SleepsAtNight.Description: Whether this NPC will sleep at night

AlertedTime.Description: The duration for which the NPC is alert before switching to attack

LeashDistance.Description: The range after which an NPC will start to want to return to their spawn point

LeashMinPlayerDistance.Description: The minimum distance from the player before the NPC will be willing to give up on the chase

LeashTimer.Description: How long the NPC must be more than the minimum distance form the player and too far from leash before giving up

BreakOffRange.Description: The range when the NPC will switch from melee back to ranged attacks

ChestBlockSet.Description: The block set designating chests for this NPC

BedBlockSet.Description: The block set designating bedrolls for this NPC

CampfireBlockSet.Description: The block set designating campfires for this NPC

UnderlingGroups.Description: A list of groups to exclude from reputation sensors

DisableDamageGroups.Description: Groups not to take damage from

CombatRelativeTurnSpeed.Description: Modifier that decides turn speed difference in combat

IsMemory.Description: Defines if the NPC is a memory

MemoriesCategory.Description: Defines the category of the memory

MemoriesNameOverride.Description: Overrides the memory name if set

NameTranslationKey.Description: Translation key for NPC name display

Actions.$TODO: Make this a blow horn or roar animation

Sensors.$Comment: If companion is dead, stick to melee
